exam_price_notes: $250 approximate; fees vary by national member board. Check local ISTQB board for exact pricing.

testing_centers.notes: Pearson VUE used in the US; other national member boards may use different providers
Exams are administered by national member boards worldwide; delivery method and provider varies by country

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name must match registration exactly. Requirements may vary by national member board.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials permitted. CTFL is the recommended prerequisite for all advanced and specialist levels. ISTQB certifications do not expire. Remote proctoring available in some countries; check with local member board.
renewal_options: ISTQB certifications do not expire and do not require renewal.
target_audience: Professionals working within Agile environments or planning to implement Agile methods in the near future.
recommended_experience: Holders of the Certified Tester Foundation Level certificate (Version 4 or earlier).

retake_policy.notes: Retake policies are set by national member boards. Check with the relevant national board for waiting periods and fees.

objectives.title: The Fundamentals of Agile Software Development
Fundamental Agile Testing Principles, Practices, and Processes
The Differences between Testing in Traditional and Agile Approaches
Status of Testing in Agile Project
Role and Skills of a Tester in an Agile Team
Agile Testing Methods, Techniques and Tools
Assessing Quality Risk and Estimating Test Effort

official_study_resources.title: ISTQB Syllabi (free download)
official_study_resources.notes: Official syllabus for each certification freely downloadable from the ISTQB website

official_study_resources.title: ISTQB Sample Exam Questions
official_study_resources.notes: Free sample exam questions provided for each certification level

aliases: certified tester foundation level agile tester ctfl-at
